title: Twilight of a Life
overview: When the doctor tells him that his mother, in her nineties, does not have long left, Sylvain Biegeleisen visits her everyday. Against all the odds, the venerable lady "decides" to hang around for a while - The director chronicles this uncertain and mysterious time in this luminous film on tenderness as a possible source of youth and full of an innocence regained every day.
